name: Lucia Rea Regulus
description: Lu appears as a young girl about the same age as Yumina Ernea Belfast. She has green eyes and neck-length silver hair, in which she wears a silver tiara. however, the strands near her face are much longer, reaching to her chest, so she holds them are in two "sleeves", much like Elze Silhoueska. When she first appeared in the series, she wore a torn apart white silk dress. her primary outfit now consists of a green bow and indigo-colored vest over a white shirt, a white pleated skirt, black tights, and short white boots.
creator: Liam1-4-1
